question: When was the first iPhone released?
response:
The first iPhone was released on June 29, 2008. It was announced by Steve Jobs at Macworld on January 9 of that year and fundamentally changed the smartphone industry.

Sources:
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IPhone_(1st_generation)

question: When was the Great Wall of China built?
response:
So, the Great Wall of China is a fascinating topic with a long history. It was built over many centuries, with the earliest sections dating to the 7th century BC. The most well-known sections were built during the Ming Dynasty (1368-1644). The wall stretches over 21,000 kilometers. The wall is truly one of the most impressive engineering feats in human history. It was built over many dynasties and represents centuries of construction effort.

Sources:
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Great_Wall_of_China
reasoning: The response uses subjective language like 'fascinating topic,' 'truly one of the most impressive engineering feats in human history,' and 'impressive,' which present opinions as facts rather than maintaining neutral, objective tone when describing historical facts.
